interpretation: Top-label ECE measures how closely predicted confidence matches empirical accuracy. Values below 0.05 are considered well-calibrated for a six-class support classifier. This model is under-confident (typical for balanced LogisticRegression on a highly-separable synthetic dataset); the UI uses argmax predictions, not confidence thresholds, so this does not affect classification behavior.
caveat: Calibration is measured on the same synthetic, highly-separable dataset used for training and evaluation. Real-world calibration may differ.
